overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing exploration of the Sanctuary of Delphi. The player character walks through ancient Greek stone pathways, past market stalls and temples, with autumn foliage and warm afternoon lighting. The scene transitions from a narrow street to a courtyard and finally to a plaza with a large robed statue.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient sanctuary street with market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone street toward the temple facade, passing golden sculptures on the left wall

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: tall stone wall adorned with golden warrior statues and large circular shields
wooden market stall with canvas canopy and large clay pottery jars displayed
classical Greek temple with stone columns, pediment, and green fabric drapes
steep rocky hillside with sparse vegetation rising behind the sanctuary

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit cobblestone street in an ancient Greek sanctuary. The camera moves forward past a stone wall adorned with golden sculptures on the left and a market stall with pottery on the right. Ahead stands a classical temple facade against a rocky mountain backdrop, while a woman in white walks ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with pottery market and snake-wrapped tree

events.description: turns right from main street into a shaded courtyard area with pottery displays

agents.ego_description: turning right into a courtyard and walking past tables displaying pottery and goods

notable_agents.action: woman in green and orange dress standing near the stone wall

entered.detail: wooden table covered with clay pots, vases, and scattered red flower petals
large tree with thick trunk wrapped by a carved stone snake sculpture
terracotta-colored stone building with hanging green fabric drapes and wreaths

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a semi-shaded courtyard featuring a distinctive snake-wrapped tree and pottery displays on wooden tables. A woman in a green dress stands near a terracotta building adorned with green banners. The golden sculpture wall and temple facade recede into the background as the camera explores this market area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone pathway between sanctuary walls

events.description: exits the courtyard into a narrow stone pathway flanked by high walls

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow passage between stone walls, passing autumn trees

entered.detail: tall stone block walls creating a narrow corridor on both sides of the path
tree with bright orange and red autumn leaves casting shadows on the path
stone archway and steps leading to an upper terrace area

segments.scene_description: Leaving the courtyard behind, the camera enters a narrow stone corridor flanked by high walls. An autumn maple tree with vibrant orange leaves stands to the left, while ahead a stone gateway leads to an upper terrace. The area is quiet and empty of people, with dappled sunlight falling on the cobblestones.

events.description: emerges from narrow pathway into open plaza with large robed statue
camera tilts upward to view the full height of the statue against the sky

agents.ego_description: approaching the large statue and looking up at it, circling around the pedestal

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow dress walking near the statue base

entered.detail: tall stone statue of a robed figure holding a staff on a decorated square pedestal
stone wall featuring a sculpted helmet and bust decoration
clay bowls and vessels placed at the base of the statue pedestal

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a sunlit plaza dominated by an imposing robed statue on a high pedestal. The camera approaches and circles the monument, tilting upward to take in its full height against the blue sky. A woman in yellow walks near the base where offering bowls are placed, while a small goat stands nearby. The narrow walls of the previous section give way to this open ceremonial space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an ancient Greek sanctuary, transitioning from a bustling market street into a secluded corridor and finally opening into a grand ceremonial plaza. It begins on a sunlit cobblestone street, moving past golden sculptures and pottery stalls toward a classical temple facade set against a rocky mountain. As the camera turns right, the scene shifts into a semi-shaded courtyard featuring a snake-wrapped tree and green banners before narrowing into a quiet stone corridor flanked by high walls and a vibrant orange autumn maple. The camera then emerges from this confined passage into a wide, sun-drenched plaza, where the view expands to reveal an imposing robed statue on a high pedestal. Finally, the movement circles the monument, tilting upward toward the blue sky as a woman in yellow and a small goat linger near the offering bowls at the statue's base.
